sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6341" key="a)nagkoqe/thsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναγκο-θέτησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n6341.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compulsion,</tr_> coined by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:6:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.7</biblScope> </bibl> as a parody on <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νομοθέτησις.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
